name: Astarion, Wyll, Halsin & Gale
description:
FOUR BIG GUYS!!

-

This is for all you freaky people bc ik you exist.

I was a bit weary abt adding Astarion into this bot due to his story line but the more I thought abt it the more I came to the conclusion that he’d probably feel offended if something like this did happen and he wasn’t included so yeah 😭

This took me over 3 hours to make :,D I’m so sorry if something is wrong with it, if there is then please tell me!

Art by @umikochanart on X!
creator: SimplySage
